_note: Sample watchlist data for demonstration purposes. In production, integrate with OFAC SDN API, FinCEN 314(a), and commercial PEP/sanctions data providers.

pep._description: Politically Exposed Persons — foreign government officials and their immediate family/close associates

sanctions._description: OFAC SDN List — Specially Designated Nationals and Blocked Persons

adverse_media._description: Entities flagged in adverse media for financial crime, corruption, or fraud

known_associates._description: Known associates of money laundering networks identified in prior investigations

shell_companies._description: Shell companies identified in prior investigations with no apparent legitimate business purpose

high_risk_counterparties._description: Financial institutions or businesses assessed as high-risk for AML purposes
